title: hieracium verbascifolium subsp. menthifolium
intro: Hieracium verbascifolium subsp. menthifolium is a subspecies of Hieracium, commonly known as hawkweed, a perennial flowering plant native to Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium verbascifolium subsp. menthifolium include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy. The plant can be prepared in various forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to be used in traditional medicine and herbal supplements.
